metadata.description: OpenClaw one-click deployment v2 — all lessons from production debugging baked in. Node 22 (not 20), Claude Code installed, openclaw setup pre-configured, loginctl enable-linger for systemd user services, openclaw gateway install creates user unit, nginx reverse proxy on port 80, NSG opens 80 and 443. Total: ~3-4 min from Create to OpenClaw login screen on a public URL.
Provider. OpenClaw v2026.4.29 uses Claude Code (anthropic) or Codex (openai).
API key. Final OAuth pairing happens via dashboard if needed.
Linux username; also runs the OpenClaw service.
IMPORTANT: Anthropic-supported region required (UAE North, West Europe, US, etc). NOT East Asia / Hong Kong.

osProfile.customData:
[base64(concat('#cloud-config
runcmd:
  - |
    set -euxo pipefail
    LOG=/var/log/openclaw-bootstrap.log
    exec > >(tee -a $LOG) 2>&1
    echo "[$(date)] OpenClaw bootstrap v2 starting"
    USER_NAME=', parameters('adminUsername'), '
    PROVIDER=', parameters('modelProvider'), '
    API_KEY=', parameters('modelApiKey'), '
    DEPLOYMENT_FQDN=', variables('dnsLabelPrefix'), '.', parameters('location'), '.cloudapp.azure.com
    apt-get update -y
    apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates git build-essential nginx
    curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -
    apt-get install -y nodejs
    node --version
    npm install -g openclaw@latest @anthropic-ai/claude-code
    loginctl enable-linger $USER_NAME
    USER_UID=$(id -u $USER_NAME)
    mkdir -p /home/$USER_NAME/.openclaw
    chown -R $USER_NAME:$USER_NAME /home/$USER_NAME/.openclaw
    printf %s "{\"version\":1,\"profiles\":{\"$PROVIDER:default\":{\"type\":\"api_key\",\"provider\":\"$PROVIDER\",\"key\":\"$API_KEY\"}}}" > /home/$USER_NAME/.openclaw/auth-profiles.json
    chown $USER_NAME:$USER_NAME /home/$USER_NAME/.openclaw/auth-profiles.json
    chmod 600 /home/$USER_NAME/.openclaw/auth-profiles.json
    sudo -u $USER_NAME XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/$USER_UID bash -c "openclaw setup < /dev/null" || true
    sudo -u $USER_NAME XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/$USER_UID bash -c "openclaw gateway install < /dev/null" || true
    sleep 3
    sudo -u $USER_NAME XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/$USER_UID bash -c "systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway" || true
    sleep 2
    printf "server_names_hash_bucket_size 128;\n" > /etc/nginx/conf.d/server-names.conf
    printf "server {\n  listen 80 default_server;\n  listen [::]:80 default_server;\n  server_name $DEPLOYMENT_FQDN;\n  client_max_body_size 100M;\n  location / {\n    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:18789;\n    proxy_http_version 1.1;\n    proxy_set_header Upgrade \$http_upgrade;\n    proxy_set_header Connection \"upgrade\";\n    proxy_set_header Host \$host;\n    proxy_set_header X-Real-IP \$remote_addr;\n    proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For \$proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n    proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto \$scheme;\n    proxy_read_timeout 86400;\n    proxy_send_timeout 86400;\n  }\n}\n" > /etc/nginx/sites-available/openclaw
    rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
    ln -sf /etc/nginx/sites-available/openclaw /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/openclaw
    nginx -t
    systemctl restart nginx
    systemctl enable nginx
    echo "[$(date)] OpenClaw bootstrap v2 complete"
'))]

firstSteps.value: Wait ~4 minutes for cloud-init. Visit openClawUrl. If auth fails, SSH in and run: claude /login then openclaw models auth add
